DJ.p: Count: 368, Examples: ['Despite being an Ultimate level, this unique Digimon can only survive by leeching off other beings. Although its power is weak when alone, it is able to draw out the abilities of its host Digimon to their utmost limits.', 'It is feared together with its younger brother Ginkakumon as the Gold and Silver Oni Brothers. A violent airhead that rushes headlong into love affairs, it hits those it is interested in, and does the same to those it dislikes.', 'A Digimon belonging to Blue Flare that wields a sharp lance, and is clad in armor made out of a special rubber. It pierces its tail into the ground and spins it, riding on it to dish out various attacks.', 'A Virus attribute Metal Garurumon, the armaments covering its entire body have been made to be cold-based. It has a merciless personality, chasing down and attacking at full power any prey it has decided upon.', 'It loves mischief, and carries out all sorts of devious attacks while in groups. While it has intelligence that matches its cunning, its cowardice means that it never acts alone, and will escape at full speed the moment it is outmatched.', 'A heavyweight Digimon that possesses armor and power fitting for its heavy appearance. It is quiet and peace-loving, and does not like conflict. However, if it has to battle, it fights making full use of its strong arms.']
DJ.pj: Count: 368, Examples: ['慈悲と慈愛を伝える女性型天使デジモンの最終形態。セラフィモン、ケルビモンと共にデジタルワールドの中心部、カーネル（神の領域）を守護している。', '神の意思を代行する巫女の役割を持つ。腰のベルトに４匹の管狐を収めた管を持ち、錫杖の音とともに響き渡るサクヤモンの歌声は邪気を祓う。', 'デジタルワールドの支配と、現実世界侵攻という野望を持ち、アルカディモンを使って超究極体への進化を求める。全ては善の存在への復讐心からである。', '燃えさかる炎を身にまとってファイアーウォールから生まれ出たデジモン。ネットワーク内を自在に飛び回り、空中からの攻撃を得意としている。', 'ウィルス種のデジモンが突然変異を起こしてワクチン種になった凶暴なハンターデジモン。ウィルス種のデジモンを狩り出す本能だけで行動する。', 'パタモンが希望のデジメンタルでアーマー進化した姿。金色の鎧に身を包み、天空を自在に駆けて、邪悪に対して神聖な力を発揮し、絶対的な強さを誇る。']

SDT.p: Count: 452, Examples: ["Possessing the alias 'Running Lightning', it trifles with the opponent using its speedy movements, moving at lightning speed just as its alias suggests.", 'A Fairy Digimon with the ability to heal wounds. It has become fast friends with Akari after becoming a member of Team Xros Heart.', 'A subspecies of War Greymon, it possesses a huge sword and is clad in armor made of a super metal known as "Chrome Digizoid".', 'It strengthened its body with "Red Digizoid", a material even harder than "Chrome Digizoid".', "Shoutmon, who is proud of its speed, and Ballistamon, who has great strength, DigiXrosed and powered up by covering each other's weaknesses.", "This Crusade Mode came about when Omega Shoutmon, with its godlike speed, attained Zeke Greymon's unmatched power."]
SDT.pj: Count: 453, Examples: ['目的のためならば手段を選ばない凶暴なデジモン。他のデジモンたちを吸収することでさらにパワーアップする。', 'スパーダモンの力を得て飛翔能力が劇的に向上した宇宙闘士形態。爆発的な推進力で敵を攻撃する。', 'パンダのような姿をしたデジモン。見かけによらずかなりの実力の持ち主で、正義の心を持っている。', 'めったに見ることができない珍しいデジモン。優しい性格をしているので、戦うことがあまり好きではない。', '熱いハートのもち主。チーム・クロスハートの仲間達とデジタルワールドを救うため旅をしている。', '怠惰を司る魔王型デジモン。1000年間眠り続けるが、目覚めた時の力は圧倒的で全てを破壊するという。']

SDTDM.p: Count: 18, Examples: ['A Holy Knight Digimon who stands at the pinnacle of all Dragon Digimon. Its enormous wings are not only used for flight, but also as shields.', 'The Star Sword it wields boasts tremendous attack power. Not only is it able to slice through enemies, it is also able to hurl off an energy wave.', 'This Digimon is said to have gone berserk and become uncontrollable due to the large amount of dark matter packed inside of it.', 'This small Digimon is said to be able to display holy powers, despite not wearing a Holy Ring.', "Its Special Move, 'Gaia Force', is a powerful technique in which it focuses the energy in the atmosphere and strikes the opponent with all of it in one shot.", 'Its cruelty is such that at times, it will not even bat an eye when betraying its comrades. Its skill at wielding its Twin Spear is unmistakably first-rate.']
SDTDM.pj: Count: 18, Examples: ['サンドゾーンでは「オーシャンラブ」でハートの橋を作り、無事難関をクリアすることができた。', '必殺技「コキュートスブレス」は、口から絶対零度の冷気を噴射させて全ての物体を凍結させてしまう。', 'デジモンキングを目指す主人公。デジタルワールドの平和を願う気持ちは誰よりも強い。', '全ての竜型デジモンの頂点に立つ聖騎士型デジモン。巨大な翼は飛翔するだけでなく、盾としての役割も持つ。', 'タイキ達に攻撃を仕掛けてきたスコルピモン達を、必殺技「ヘブンズゲート」でまたたく間に一掃した。', '小型の恐竜のような姿のデジモン。勇敢な性格で怖いもの知らず。両手の硬く鋭い爪で相手を切り裂く。']
